controlWrapper.title: ControlWrapper Options Showcase
controlWrapper.description: Demonstrates all available options for the ControlWrapper component

defaultPlacement.title: Default Label Placement
defaultPlacement.description: This field uses the default label placement (left)

topPlacement.title: Top Label Placement
topPlacement.description: This field has the label placed on top

rightPlacement.title: Right Label Placement
rightPlacement.description: This field has the label on the right side

floatPlacement.title: Float Label Placement
floatPlacement.description: This field uses a floating label

hiddenLabel.title: Hidden Label
hiddenLabel.description: This field has no visible label

tooltipDescription.title: Tooltip Description
tooltipDescription.description: This description appears as a tooltip when hovering over the info icon

alwaysDescription.title: Always Visible Description
alwaysDescription.description: This description is always visible below the field

spaceBetweenLeft.title: Space Between (Left Label)
spaceBetweenLeft.description: Label on left, field on right with space between

spaceBetweenRight.title: Space Between (Right Label)
spaceBetweenRight.description: Field on left, label on right with space between

spaceBetweenLong.title: Very Long Label Name That Takes Up More Space
